summaries.summary: Kosovo eid is the national system that manages electronic identities for citizens of kosovo. Citizens can get their electronic id by going through a enrollment process at the civil registration offices ( ) counters. In a similar way, citizens can obtain an electronic seal through the enrollment process.

To obtain an electronic id, you will need to go through the enrollment process at the civil registration offices (arc). For a digital seal, the process takes place at the kosovo business registration agency (arbk) for now, online enrollment is not available. This is intentional, to ensure the highest possible.

The self service portal is the tool that allows you to manage your certificate(s) and to migrate the wallet when you change your device. To access the self-service portal you would need the certificate information that you received during the enrollment process (the certificate user name and password).
Kosovo wallet is a mobile app used to safely keep the credentials of the electronic id or electronic seal. It is available for iOS and Android devices.

The eid API is available for third-party integrators who want to add kosovo eid features into their own systems. Any software — web, mobile, or backend — that has a permanent internet connection can connect to the eidapi.
The desktop and mobile signing apps are used to allow using the electronic id for signing and stamping documents. The apps are available on iOS and Android.

Strong authentication is a very useful and powerful feature provided by eid. This feature will allow your users to . Strong authentication be aware that we cannot authorise your users inside your systems. We can only authenticate them. Test it for implementing the strong authentication with kosovo wallet in the.
